\n**Note:** This piece requires a **Micr:
**Note:** This piece requires a **Microsoft 365 Copilot license** to access Copilot interaction data.

If you’d like to use your own custom Azure app instead of the default Activepieces app, follow the [Azure app creation guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/entra/identity-platform/quickstart-register-app#register-an-application),
 set the **Redirect URI** to {{redirectUrl}} and add the following **Microsoft Graph (Delegated) permissions** under **API permissions**:
 - Sites.Read.All
 - Mail.Read
 - Files.ReadWrite.All
 - People.Read.All
 - OnlineMeetingTranscript.Read.All
 - Chat.Read
 - ChannelMessage.Read.All
 - ExternalItem.Read.All
 - AiEnterpriseInteraction.Read
 - Files.Read.All
Send a message to an existing Copilot co: 发送一条消息到现有的 Copilot 对话或创建一个新的对话并得到回应
Perform hybrid (semantic and lexical) se: 使用自然语言查询，在OneDrive进行混合(语义和词汇)搜索以获取工作或学校内容
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
The ID of an existing conversation. If n: 现有对话的 ID。如果没有提供，将创建一个新的会话。
User location time zone in IANA format (: IANA格式中的用户位置时区（如：美洲/纽约；欧洲/伦敦）
Natural language query to search for rel: 搜索相关文件的自然语言查询。最多1,500个字符。
KQL filter expression for OneDrive data: OneDrive 数据源的 KQL 过滤器表达式(https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/sharpoint/dev/general-development/keyword-query-language-kql-syntax-reference)。示例：路径:"https://contoso-my.sharpoint.com/personal/user/Documents/"
Array of metadata field names to include: 要包含在结果中的元数据字段名称数组。例如：["title", "author"]
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
HEAD: 黑色
